name: ICEEL 2026 — International Conference on Education and E-Learning
subset_axis: East Asian (Japan / China / Korea / Taiwan) studies subset, plus targeted Japan synthesis using author's own A-25 Tokiwa 2025 and A-31 Rivers 2021.
novel_analysis: Hofstede cultural-dimensions moderator analysis (Power Distance, Individualism, Long-Term Orientation, Uncertainty Avoidance) on Big Five trait–achievement correlations; integrative narrative synthesis of Japan-specific online learning context. NOT in preprint.
notes: Tokyo venue minimises travel cost for Japan-based author. Author has prior Frontiers in Psychology Japan-context publication (P1, 2025).
